            e(.Double latitude)
            e(.Double longitude)

        i(dv(c(
            e(.UInt32 color)
            e(.UInt32 weight%20%28px%29)
        ) (4278433157 2 ))dataItem_StrokeStyle)
        i(dv(.ErrorCluster (false 0 '' ))dataItem_ErrorIn)

        o(dv(.ErrorCluster (false 0 '' ))dataItem_ErrorOut)

            e(.UInt32 color)
            e(.UInt32 weight%20%28px%29)
        ) local13)
        e(a(c(
            e(.Double latitude)
            e(.Double longitude)
        ) *) local16)
        e(.String local17)
        e(.ErrorCluster local18)
        e(.String local19)
        e(.ErrorCluster local20)
        e(.JavaScriptDynamicRefNum local21)
        e(.ErrorCluster local22)
        e(.ErrorCluster local23)

        e(.JavaScriptDynamicRefNum local25)
        e(dv(.Boolean true)local26)
